# Freight Bridge LLC
> Bridging Businesses to Their Customers

## NAP
- Name: Freight Bridge LLC
- Address: Iowa City, Iowa City, IA 52245
- Phone: (641) 451-3132
- Email: info@freightbridgellc.com

## Hours
Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun closed

## Domain
https://freightbridgellc.com

## Description
Freight Bridge LLC is a trusted moving and freight hauling company based in Iowa City, Iowa. As an authorized interstate carrier (USDOT 4414774, MC-1734786), we handle residential and commercial moves, haul freight in all 50 states for brokers and dispatchers with our own truck, and provide post-construction hauling for data center projects in the Iowa City and Cedar Rapids corridor. Our experienced team is hands-on with every job.

## Owner
Mohamed Soliman

## Payment Accepted
Credit Card, Wire Transfer, ACH, Invoice (Net 30)

## Year Established
2020
